# SRE — Start • Restart • Explore

> SRE is a self-growth ecosystem platform built around progression, accountability, consistency, and community-driven improvement. It unifies learning progression, fitness tracking, content creation journeys, social discovery, AI-assisted learning, and live updates into one platform.

## What this platform does
- Public progression feed: users share live learning, fitness, and content creation updates
- Discover system: topic, post, user, and group discovery with hashtag-based search
- Fitness tracking: log workouts, consistency streaks, and share progress
- Content creator tracking: document creative journeys publicly
- AI-assisted learning: guided topic exploration (preview for guests, full for members)
- Community: profiles, groups, friends, progression-based communities

## Who it helps
Students, self-improvement enthusiasts, beginners learning skills, fitness learners, content creators, productivity-focused individuals.

## Platform philosophy
SRE stands for Start • Restart • Explore — representing starting new journeys, restarting abandoned goals, and exploring new domains.

## Key URLs
- Home: https://sretrack.vercel.app/
- Feed: https://sretrack.vercel.app/feed
- Discover: https://sretrack.vercel.app/discover
- About: https://sretrack.vercel.app/about
- Privacy Policy: https://sretrack.vercel.app/privacy
- Terms: https://sretrack.vercel.app/terms
- Contact: https://sretrack.vercel.app/contact
